protein_name: Necessary for scanning and involved in initiation site selection. Promotes the assembly of 48S ribosomal complexes at the authentic initiation codon of a conventional capped mRNA. Belongs to the SUI1 family. Note: This description may include information from UniProtKB.

raw_fields.Cellular Component: cytoplasm; eukaryotic 43S preinitiation complex; eukaryotic 48S preinitiation complex; multi-eIF complex; nucleus
raw_fields.Molecular Function: protein binding; ribosomal small subunit binding; RNA binding; translation factor activity, RNA binding; translation initiation factor activity
raw_fields.Biological Process: regulation of gene expression; regulation of primary metabolic process; regulation of translational initiation; translation; translational initiation
raw_fields.Alt. Names/Synonyms: A121; EIF-1; EIF1; EIF1A; Eukaryotic translation initiation factor 1; ISO1; Protein translation factor SUI1 homolog; SUI1; Sui1iso1
raw_fields.Basal Isoelectric point: 6.9 Predict pI for various phosphorylation states
